testcase.name: test_multichip_precision_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1492: tt::exception info: Statically allocated circular buffers on core range [0-0 - 7-9] grow to testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7b9b506fe160>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_precision_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Cross real-weight projection dtype/fidelity and explicit SDPA policy."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in PRECISION_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(PRECISION_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=PRECISION_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:951: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:850: in _run_decode_policy_candidate candidate_output = candidate.decode_forward(hidden, candidate_key, candidate_value, current_pos=7) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2266: in decode_forward return self._decode_forward_device_position( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2212: in _decode_forward_device_position hidden_states = self._mlp_decode_flat(hidden_states) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1945: in _mlp_decode_flat return self._all_reduce_flat(super()._mlp_decode(hidden_states), memory_config=self.residual_mem_config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/optimized_decoder.py:803: in _mlp_decode gate_up = ttnn.linear( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.linear', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.matmul.linear_t object at 0x7b9b54d6f790>, preprocess_golden_function_inputs=<function default_preprocess_golden_function_inputs at 0x7b9b54917b00>, golden_function=<function _golden_function at 0x7b9b54788040>, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=<function default_postprocess_golden_function_outputs at 0x7b9b54917ba0>, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.4121e-01, 2.1289e-01, ..., -1.4062e-01, -2.6245e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.4121e-01, 2.1289e-01, ..., -1.4062e-01, -2.6245e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.4121e-01, 2.1289e-01, ..., -1.4062e-01, -2.6245e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 0, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.4121e-01, 2.1289e-01, ..., -1.4062e-01, -2.6245e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE), device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[-2.6367e-02, -4.3945e-03, ..., -6.3477e-03, 4.6387e-03], [-4.3945e-03, -3.6621e-03, ..., 1.2939e-02, -1.2207e-03], ..., [-1.0986e-02, 1.6113e-02, ..., 7.3242e-04, 3.4180e-03], [ 5.6152e-03, 7.5684e-03, ..., -2.4414e-03, 2.1973e-02]], shape=Shape([8192, 14336]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[-3.9062e-03, 0.0000e+00, ..., -3.4180e-03, -1.7090e-03], [ 9.2773e-03, -3.9062e-03, ..., 0.0000e+00, -9.7656e-04], ..., [-3.4180e-03, 2.1729e-02, ..., 8.3008e-03, -7.3242e-04], [-8.7891e-03, 2.9297e-03, ..., -8.5449e-03, 2.1729e-02]], shape=Shape([8192, 14336]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[-7.0801e-03, 1.2207e-02, ..., 6.8359e-03, -1.8066e-02], [ 1.7090e-03, dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 0, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[-2.9297e-03, 7.5684e-03, ..., 2.4414e-04, -2.4414e-03], [-5.6152e-03, -1.0498e-02, ..., 4.8828e-03, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x7b9b4e1b4bd0>, 'dtype': DataType.BFLOAT16, 'memory_config': MemoryConfig(memory_layout=TensorMemoryLayout::WIDTH_SHARDED,buffer_type=BufferType::L1,shard_spec=std::nullopt,nd_shard_spec=std::nullopt,created_with_nd_shard_spec=0), 'program_config': MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCastDRAMShardedProgramConfig(in0_block_w=8,per_core_M=1,per_core_N=14,fused_activation=std::nullopt)} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ ttnn/ttnn/decorators.py:473: RuntimeError
